x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: CMDB Health jobs produce the Completeness and Correctness scores that quantify AI data readiness. Without these jobs running, CMDB-01 and CMDB-06 cannot return real scores.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Enable all 3 CMDB Health jobs via: All > Configuration > CMDB Dashboard > CMDB View > CMDB Health Dashboard Jobs. Activate Completeness, Correctness, and Compliance Score Calculation jobs. Without these running, CMDB health scores cannot be calculated.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_0a03a33acfd903108935fb251d851c66
sys_update_version.payload:
CMDB Health jobs produce the Completeness and Correctness scores that quantify AI data readiness. Without these jobs running, CMDB-01 and CMDB-06 cannot return real scores.

]]> CMDB Health Scheduled Job Status -1) healthJobs.completeness = isScheduled; if (name.indexOf('Correctness') > -1) healthJobs.correctness = isScheduled; if (name.indexOf('Compliance') > -1) healthJobs.compliance = isScheduled; jobDetails.push(name + ' [' + runType + ']'); } var coreJobsScheduled = healthJobs.completeness && healthJobs.correctness && healthJobs.compliance; var actualValue = totalFound + ' CMDB Health jobs found | ' + scheduledCount + ' scheduled'; if (totalFound === 0) { return { status: 'not_ready', actualValue: actualValue, finding: 'No CMDB Health Dashboard jobs found. Navigate to: All > Configuration > CMDB Dashboard > CMDB Health Dashboard Jobs to enable. Without these jobs, CHK0002210 and CHK0002215 cannot return official health scores.' }; } else if (!coreJobsScheduled) { return { status: 'not_ready', actualValue: actualValue, finding: 'CMDB Health Dashboard jobs exist but one or more core jobs (Completeness, Correctness, Compliance) are not scheduled. Found: ' + totalFound + ' jobs, ' + scheduledCount + ' scheduled. Jobs: ' + jobDetails.join(' | ') }; } else { return { status: 'ready', actualValue: actualValue, finding: scheduledCount + ' of ' + totalFound + ' CMDB Health Dashboard jobs are scheduled and active. Official CMDB health scores are being generated. Jobs: ' + jobDetails.join(' | ') }; } })]]> true false false CMDB CHK0006015 180 Enable all 3 CMDB Health jobs via: All > Configuration > CMDB Dashboard > CMDB View > CMDB Health Dashboard Jobs. Activate Completeness, Correctness, and Compliance Score Calculation jobs. Without these running, CMDB health scores cannot be calculated. admin 2026-06-09 22:05:59 0a03a33acfd903108935fb251d851c66 0 admin 2026-06-09 22:05:59
